hero.eyebrow: Greek Developer · Premium Managed Residences · Chalkidiki
hero.heading: Xhoose Greece.
hero.headingItalic: We make it work for you.
hero.description: We develop, build, and fully manage premium residences across Greece’s finest destinations — delivering a lifestyle asset and high-yield investment under one brand.

contact.heading: Let’s start
contact.description: Our investment team will respond within one business day with a tailored presentation.

method.heroDesc: Most holiday properties either work for you or you enjoy them. Serene is built to do both — at the same time.
method.oldWay: Buy a holiday property. Deal with multiple contractors, interior designers, management companies, rental agencies. Coordinate everything yourself. Hope it works out.
method.sereneWay: One company. Developer, builder, interior designer, and manager — all under one roof. You choose your unit. We handle everything else, forever.

pillars.title: Developer & Builder
pillars.desc: We design, permit, and build the entire compound to one unified standard. No subcontractors passing the blame.

pillars.title: Interior & Fit-Out
pillars.desc: Designed by leading Greek architects and interior designers. Every unit finished and furnished to hotel specification — down to the last detail.

pillars.title: Hotel-Grade Management
pillars.desc: Check-in, housekeeping, maintenance, guest services, rental marketing — managed by Serene, to Serene standards, permanently.

benefits.title: Full legal ownership
benefits.desc: Title deed in your name. Freehold property under Greek law.

benefits.title: Personal use rights
benefits.desc: Book your unit as an owner anytime through our dedicated owner portal.

benefits.title: Shared rental income
benefits.desc: Revenue and costs distributed across all owners — transparently, by unit type.

benefits.title: Zero operational burden
benefits.desc: No guests to manage, no repairs to coordinate, no invoices to chase.

steps.title: Choose Your Unit
steps.desc: Select type, zone, and view. Reserve with a fully refundable deposit.

steps.title: Sign & Pay by Milestones
steps.desc: Payments tied to construction progress — not arbitrary deadlines.

steps.title: Receive Keys
steps.desc: Fully furnished, styled, and guest-ready. Not a single detail left to you.

steps.title: Start Earning
steps.desc: Management begins on day one. You receive income. We handle everything.

booking.heading: Stay in a Serene property. Experience what investors own.
booking.description: Whether you’re planning a summer escape in Halkidiki or a city break in Thessaloniki — our fully managed, hotel-standard villas and apartments are available to book directly.

stayOptions.label: Weekend Escape
stayOptions.desc: Perfect for a quick coastal getaway. Arrive Friday, leave Monday — fully prepared, hotel-standard villa waiting for you.

stayOptions.label: Weekly Stay
stayOptions.desc: The most popular option. A full week in Halkidiki with private pool, steps from Sahara Beach, and 24/7 Serene hospitality.

stayOptions.label: Mid-Term · Monthly
stayOptions.desc: For digital nomads, extended families, or seasonal residents. Our Thessaloniki apartments offer exceptional value for longer stays.

amenities.title: Private Pool
amenities.desc: Exclusively yours for the entire stay

amenities.title: Prime Location
amenities.desc: 100m from beach · Next to Sahara Club

urgencyBar.availability: 14 of 25 units sold or reserved · Pre-sale pricing ends Q3 2025

advantages.title: Prime Location
advantages.description: Kallikratia gateway · steps from Sahara Beach Club

advantages.title: Fully Managed
advantages.description: ~5% net yield · hands-off · managed from day one

advantages.title: Developer-Direct
advantages.description: No middlemen · transparent pricing · foundation to keys

advantages.title: Beach Access
advantages.description: Adjacent to Sahara Beach Club · Halkidiki’s finest

locationSection.title: Kallikratia, Halkidiki
locationSection.description: Kallikratia sits at the gateway to Halkidiki — where the Thermaic Gulf meets the Aegean peninsula. Established, authentic, and 30 minutes from Thessaloniki — without the crowds of the tourist south.

investmentSection.title: Real Yield. Real Management.
investmentSection.description: Greek real estate is appreciating at 12–18% YoY. Buy at pre-sale developer pricing, receive rental income from operation launch, and benefit from capital growth at handover — all without lifting a finger.

paymentPlan.description: Structured around construction milestones, protecting your investment at every stage.
paymentPlan.note: Bank financing available — up to 50% of purchase price through our preferred Greek banking partners. EU and non-EU residents eligible.

timeline.description: Full transparency on every milestone — from groundbreak to handover.

specs.label: Bathrooms
specs.value: Italian porcelain · Rain shower · Heated towel rail

specs.label: HVAC
specs.value: Inverter A/C + ceiling fan in each room

specs.label: Pool
specs.value: Private plunge pool · Saltwater system · LED lighting

specs.label: Smart Home
specs.value: App-controlled locks · Fibre broadband · Smart TV

locationDetail.heading: A location that cannot be replicated.
